meaning: adj.有毒的,分泌毒液的,有毒腺的,恶意的,狠毒的
examples: In Kravis's venomous tone he recognized the realization of his worst fears.
A couple of venomous lizards were included in this study.
He had been bitten by a venomous snake.
The 17-year-old former child actor has a venomous serve, powerful groundstrokes and bundles of confidence.
But with only Karelse to beat, Henry struck his venomous shot into the side-netting.
